changeSet.author: kanix
changeSet.comment: Enforce immutability on evidence_record table at the DB level. Prevents UPDATE and DELETE operations via trigger, ensuring evidence records are append-only for dispute integrity.
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_evidence_record_no_update BEFORE UPDATE ON evidence_record FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION prevent_evidence_record_update();
CREATE TRIGGER trg_evidence_record_no_delete BEFORE DELETE ON evidence_record FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION prevent_evidence_record_delete();
